privileged_info_summary: The task requires performance auditing of 5 real, public websites: news.ycombinator.com (Hacker News), en.wikipedia.org (English Wikipedia), developer.mozilla.org (MDN Web Docs), www.python.org (Python official site), and docs.github.com (GitHub documentation). The agent must export at least 3 HAR files to ~/Documents/har_exports/ and create a performance report at ~/Documents/performance_report.json containing request counts, transfer sizes, and resource breakdown for each site. All metadata claims are consistent with task requirements and description.
